# Code Style

- Use async/await syntax
- Add TypeScript types
- Format with Prettier

# Testing

- Write unit tests
- Use Jest framework
- Mock dependencies

# Security

- Validate user input
- Use parameterized queries
- Implement authentication

# Documentation

- Add JSDoc comments
- Maintain README
- Provide examples

# Error Handling

- Use try-catch blocks
- Log errors appropriately
- Never swallow errors

# Performance

- Use memoization
- Implement caching
- Optimize queries
